name: chronicle
description: Capture AI coding sessions and render a private self-updating project brain.

interface.shortDescription: Turn AI coding sessions into a private project brain.
interface.longDescription: Chronicle captures session summaries through lifecycle hooks and renders a self-contained personal devlog, project-brain HTML page, team report, and root project index from a local item store.
defaultPrompt: Use Chronicle to render my project brain.
Use Chronicle to render my team report.
Use Chronicle to capture this session into the devlog.
